title: Better Turtles
description: This is a minecraft pack that changes turtles to Leatherback turtles (variant/spin off of marioz170 Fresh Better Turtle Variants)
body:
This pack is a spinoff/continuation of marioz170 Fresh Better Turtle Variants which hasnt been updated. You can find his original pack on curseforge titled: Fresh Better Turtle Variants. This pack adds a leatherback turtle design taken from Fresh Better Turtle Variants, but also adds a unique turtle helmet, and scute. 

showcase video

https://youtu.be/eBSOJDuxuKs
